cases.description: Provisional attachment order under PMLA 2002. ED attached properties worth ₹423.38 Cr belonging to Ozone Urban Infrastructure Private Limited for alleged money laundering through shell entities. FIR registered against promoters Vijay Anand and Suresh Reddy.
cases.party_history: Vijay Anand — Director, Ozone Urban Infrastructure Pvt Ltd

cases.description: Homebuyers filed writ petition seeking K-RERA intervention for refund of ₹927.22 Cr collected for units delayed over 4 years. Relief sought: receiver appointment, promoter bank account freeze, accelerated RERA complaint hearing.

cases.plaintiff: Residents of Hebbal Lake Area (NGO: Lake Guardians Karnataka)
cases.description: NGT imposed ₹117.35 Cr environmental compensation for construction within 300m buffer zone of Hebbal Lake. Direction issued to halt all further construction until MoEFCC compliance audit completed. Fine partially deposited (₹23.4 Cr of ₹117.35 Cr).
prior_cases: OA 212/2019 — earlier NGT query, resolved by undertaking

cases.plaintiff: State Bank of India (Operational Creditor — ₹456.68 Cr NPA)
cases.description: SBI filed insolvency petition under IBC 2016 for NPA of ₹456.68 Cr. Interim Resolution Professional (IRP) Rajeev Menon appointed. Moratorium in effect from Dec 2023. 892 homebuyers affected. Committee of Creditors constituted — first meeting Jan 2024.
cases.party_history: Sushil Mantri — Promoter, multiple related party transactions under ED scrutiny

cases.description: 18 homebuyers filed K-RERA complaint for refund of ₹8.4 Cr after 30-month possession delay. QPR filing default for 4 consecutive quarters. Developer cited COVID + material shortage. RERA issued show-cause notice Nov 2023.

K-RERA issued suo motu show-cause notice for 3 consecutive QPR defaults. Construction stalled at 18% for 8 months. RERA directed promoter to appear before adjudicating officer and explain escrow irregularities.
